targets.rawSql: SELECT status AS "Status" FROM ingestion_metadata ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT manuscripts_ingested AS "Count" FROM ingestion_metadata ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT verses_linked AS "Count" FROM ingestion_metadata ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT duration_ms AS "Duration" FROM ingestion_metadata WHERE duration_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
SELECT finished_at AS "Finished" FROM ingestion_metadata WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT phase_name AS "Phase", status AS "Status", items_processed AS "Processed", items_total AS "Total", CASE WHEN items_total > 0 THEN ROUND(items_processed * 100.0 / items_total, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "Progress %", started_at AS "Started", completed_at AS "Completed", CASE WHEN started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at))::int ELSE NULL END AS "Duration (s)", error_message AS "Error", last_run_by AS "Run By" FROM council_ingestion_phases ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'running' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 WHEN status = 'success' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, phase_name

SELECT 'Manuscripts' AS "Domain", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM manuscripts UNION ALL SELECT 'Verses', COUNT(*) FROM verses UNION ALL SELECT 'Manuscript-Verse Links', COUNT(*) FROM manuscript_verses UNION ALL SELECT 'Church Fathers', COUNT(*) FROM church_fathers UNION ALL SELECT 'Textual Statements', COUNT(*) FROM father_textual_statements UNION ALL SELECT 'Councils', COUNT(*) FROM councils UNION ALL SELECT 'Heresies', COUNT(*) FROM heresies UNION ALL SELECT 'Council Canons', COUNT(*) FROM council_canons UNION ALL SELECT 'Sources', COUNT(*) FROM sources UNION ALL SELECT 'Source Claims', COUNT(*) FROM council_source_claims ORDER BY 1
